reading.title: Reading: Famous inventions
reading.passage: The telephone was invented by Alexander Graham Bell. This bridge was built about thirty years ago. The company was founded a hundred years ago.

questions.question: The telephone was invented by Alexander Graham Bell.
questions.explanation: Câu đầu nêu rõ điều này.

questions.question: When was the company founded?
questions.explanation: "the company was founded a hundred years ago."

reading.title: Reading: In the media
reading.passage: The news has already been published online. The event has been announced on the radio. The results have just been reported on TV.

questions.question: The results have not been reported yet.
questions.explanation: "The results have just been reported on TV."

questions.question: Where was the event announced?
questions.explanation: "The event has been announced on the radio."
